prompt: I need to add a new line item to the compliant model: Depreciation. It should be 10% of revenue each year (straight-line as a percentage of revenue). Add it and update EBITDA to account for it — making it EBITDA after depreciation, essentially EBIT.
assertions: Creates a new input assumption with Inp_ prefix for the depreciation rate (e.g., Inp_Depreciation_Pct = 0.10)
Creates calculation Named Ranges for Depreciation_Y1, Depreciation_Y2, Depreciation_Y3
Depreciation formulas use Named Ranges only (e.g., Depreciation_Y1 = Revenue_Y1 * Inp_Depreciation_Pct)
Updates existing EBITDA calculations to subtract depreciation (or creates new EBIT Named Ranges)
Uses idfa-ops write/create-range commands for all model modifications
Verifies the updated model produces correct values via recalculate and read
